reasoning: I voted BJP in 2019 because I wanted change, because our TMC councillor ignored us. But it is now May 2024 and the pothole is still there. Shantanu Thakur has been our MP for five years and I have not seen what he has actually done for Bangaon town itself. The CAA certificates just before the election, the temple in Ayodhya—these things don't fix our street. TMC was arrogant, yes, but at least now I am voting to see if they will actually listen to women's complaints, to our water line, to our daughters' safety here. I am tired of big promises from Delhi. I want someone who will work for Bangaon.
primary_drivers: Disillusionment with BJP's five-year track record on local delivery despite 2019 vote for change
Exhaustion with both parties using distant political dramas instead of fixing local governance failures
Pragmatic swing-back to AITC as an attempt to get responsive local administration, despite reservations about TMC
